channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Ulasi Says 2023 PDP Convention Caused Internal Party Crisis
item.description: Dan Ulasi, one big man for Peoples Democratic Party (PDP), don talk say di gbege wey dey inside di party today start from di 2023 presidential convention wey happen for Eagle Square. For Arise Televis...

item.title: Kiambu Land Dispute in Court Over Competing Ownership Claims
item.description: The long-standing land dispute over Paradise Lost in Kiambu has escalated to the Environment and Land Court, with both sides accusing each other of fraud and illegal occupation. The family of the alle...

item.title: How misinformation don slow down and increase the cost of Nigeria’s economic reforms
item.description: This article explain how Nigeria’s recent economic reforms, especially under the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN), don achieve strong results but at a hidden cost caused by widespread misinformation. One...

item.title: Treasurer Chalmers outlines potential $50 million savings for ACT from proposed NDIS reforms
item.description: The ACT government is expected to save $50 million due to the Albanese government's planned changes to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), according to Treasury modelling. The reforms wil...

item.title: Three dead as ethnic violence persists in India’s Manipur amid ongoing tensions
item.description: At least three men were killed in fresh gun battles between rival ethnic groups in India’s northeastern Manipur state, according to local police. The incident took place in Mullam village of Ukhrul di...

item.title: FG Warns Nigerians in South Africa Over Rising Anti-Foreigner Protests and Safety Risks
item.description: Federal Government don advise Nigerians wey dey South Africa to shine their eye and stay careful as fresh anti-foreigner protests dey planned for different parts of the country. Dis warning come throu...

item.title: Thousands Forced to Flee as Wildfires Ravage Homes in Japan
item.description: Wildfires in northeast Japan have caused widespread destruction, forcing around 3,000 people to evacuate their homes as the flames draw near residential areas. The fires, which have been burning since...

item.title: Pronto Nears $20M Funding Round Led by Lachy Groom, Doubling Valuation to $200M
item.description: Indian startup Pronto, which offers on-demand household services, is reportedly close to securing a new funding round led by investor Lachy Groom that would value the company at approximately $200 mil...

item.title: Blicavs sidelined as Port Adelaide gains upper hand over Geelong; Hollands withdrawn from Carlton match
item.description: Port Adelaide surged ahead of Geelong during their Anzac Day clash at Adelaide Oval, capitalising on injuries to key Cats players and a growing midfield advantage. The Cats were dealt a significant bl...

item.title: Senator Karen Nyamu Engages Youths with Siaka Challenge During Warembo na Ruto Forum
item.description: Nominated senator Karen Nyamu, who was recently recognised as a Nyakinyua elder, took part in the viral Siaka dance challenge during the Warembo na Ruto forum. The challenge, popular among Kenyan yout...

item.title: Jimmy Bullard explains his departure from I’m A Celeb amid heated row with Adam Thomas
item.description: Jimmy Bullard, former footballer and reality TV star, revealed the reasons behind his sudden departure from the I’m A Celeb: South Africa show. The exit occurred during a challenge, sparking a heated ...

item.title: The Impact of Losing Ecological Buffers on Water Scarcity in India
item.description: In the 319th episode of Eco India, the programme highlights how the loss of ecological buffers is significantly contributing to worsening water scarcity across the country. Ecological buffers such as ...

item.title: First recorded use of canopy bridge by Sumatran orangutan offers hope for fragmented habitats
item.description: Conservationists in North Sumatra, Indonesia, have recorded the first-ever footage of a critically endangered Sumatran orangutan using a specially built canopy bridge to cross a road. The bridge, cons...

item.title: Court of Appeals Freezes Martin Romualdez’s Assets Over Flood Control Anomalies
item.description: The Court of Appeals has issued a freeze order on former House Speaker Martin Romualdez’s assets following allegations of involvement in flood control project anomalies. According to Ombudsman Jesus C...

item.title: SBMA launches program to recycle electronic waste and promote circular economy
item.description: The Subic Bay Metropolitan Authority (SBMA) has initiated a program to collect and recycle electronic and electrical waste in the Subic Bay Freeport. The project, called 'Closing the Loop on E-Waste,'...

item.title: Pakistan's LNG Deal Becomes More Expensive Due to Strait of Hormuz Closure
item.description: Pakistan LNG Limited (PLL) has been forced to approve a revised bid of $18.4 per million British thermal units (mmBtu) for LNG delivery between April 27 and 30, following the closure of the Strait of ...

item.title: Canberra United’s A-League Season Ends in Heartbreak Amid Uncertainty Over Future
item.description: Canberra United’s A-League finals hopes came to a dramatic end with a 3-1 loss to Melbourne Victory, leaving the future of the club uncertain. Despite a strong performance from homegrown talent Sasha ...

item.title: Brumbies defeated by Hurricanes at new Christchurch stadium
item.description: The ACT Brumbies suffered a heavy 45-12 defeat against the Hurricanes at Christchurch's new Te Kaha Stadium, a venue designed to withstand major earthquakes. Despite the Brumbies' hopes of hosting a h...

item.title: Palestinian Elections Held Despite Israeli Restrictions
item.description: Palestinians recently held elections, marking a significant moment for the region despite facing considerable challenges and restrictions imposed by Israel. The vote, considered a landmark event, aims...

item.title: Wine investment opportunities as market recovers: expert picks bottles with growth potential
item.description: The article explains that the fine wine market has experienced a significant downturn following a pandemic-era boom, during which demand and prices surged. Over the past three years, prices declined d...
